title: hand-rolled JSON scanner is correct and worth defending
description: The hand-rolled JSON scanner in secretx-core (json_extract_string_field, json_navigate) is correctly replacing serde_json for secret extraction. It ensures only the target field's value enters a Zeroizing allocation; serde_json would allocate plain String copies of every field. The scanner validates full RFC 8259 grammar (control chars, surrogate pairs, number forms, trailing garbage). 75 tests cover edge cases with independent oracles. A future contributor may suggest 'why not just use serde_json' — the answer is the zeroization guarantee, which is load-bearing for the security model. Do not replace.
